creator: neutrondaemon@protonmail.com
text:
I'm having the exact same issue on FreeBSD Hades 13.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p3

this is the error I keep getting:

Jul 18 17:32:48 BSDpc kernel: Root mount waiting for: usbus0
Jul 18 17:32:48 BSDpc kernel: usbd_setup_device_desc: getting device descriptor at addr 3 failed, USB_ERR_TIMEOUT

over and over it eventually stops and starts xfce, but it adds too much boot time.
